The following events took place in '''25,130 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The reign of the tyrannical ruler, [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]], begins in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Argai]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Xer VIII]] retired on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]].<ref name="Xim Week">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}}</ref>
*Xim killed his brothers and father according to the [[Evocar (play)|''Evocar'' play]].<ref name="xwpp">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/ximweek03/index.html|text=Xim Week: ''The Despotica'' (Part II: The Pirate Prince)|int=Xim Week: The Despotica}}</ref>
